title: fairadi: A FAIR-Compliant U.S. Deprivation Indices Dataset
name: fairadi
description: Reproducible U.S. Area Deprivation Index build derived from U.S. Census Bureau ACS 5-year and Decennial Census tables. The repository contains tracked source tables, derived outputs, documentation, and integrity metadata for the annual release snapshot.

files.description: Column-level schema and value notes for the fairadi dataset.
Tracked-file inventory with SHA-256 digests and file sizes.

licenses.upstream_source_data: U.S. Census Bureau source data are in the public domain.

related_resources.title: Neighborhood socioeconomic disadvantage and 30-day rehospitalization: a retrospective cohort study
